original_text:
Help please, Spotify ghost harassing me... — 

I need help...

3 months ago, my Spotify account has started playing songs, randomly, that I did not request or start listening to. The phone will be on the counter and randomly it'll be playing a Spotify song... but it's a song I don't know and not on my Playlist. I didn't turn it on or open Spotify.

I tried log out everywhere and changed my password. I also removed any integrations just incase. It keeps doing it though. 2am, 4pm, 11am, random, and always the same weird 2 or 3 songs that I don't know and arnt in my playlist.

It's been months and no resolution.

My next plan is to just close the account entirely, but I dont see a way to move my playlist with 800 songs to the new account AND still let me add more to it. I can see a way to make it public and then share that public playlist with the new account but that new account will not be able to add more songs to that same playlist. Is there a way to move the playlist to a new account in a way that the new account can add songs to that same playlist. I don't want to share the playlist with the new account I want to transfer it fully so that the new account can add songs and continue to grow that playlist. Can this be done? I feel it is my only option at this point... please help me escape this Spotify ghost that is haunting me...
discovery_reason: User provides discovery-related feedback with research value

original_text:
Recommend Songs for My Playlists While Finding a Song for Yourself! — Hey everyone! Feel free to dive into my playlists and discover new music while helping me expand my music library. I'm looking for fresh recommendations based on one of my public playlists, mainly Hall of Eternal Echoes (my all-time favourites), Current favourites (Songs that I am not tired of listening atm), or any of my other public playlists.

Check them out and drop a song, album, artist, or even a whole vibe you think would fit perfectly. If you enjoy my playlists, feel free to follow me or save them to your library. Your suggestions are what keep this journey exciting!

P.S. No self-promotion or bot spam. I’m here for genuine music magic only.

[https://open.spotify.com/user/t1d04rgi8f2fh5iu2jb9kau3t?si=398e876de50a4586](https://open.spotify.com/user/t1d04rgi8f2fh5iu2jb9kau3t?si=398e876de50a4586)

Did they change the shuffle?? — (I'm on desktop app) There used to be a shuffle button at the top of Liked Songs playlist. I often chose music to listen to by shuffling the Liked Songs, and when I came across a good one, I'd click over to the album and start listening to the album in chronological order, as I am more of an album listener these days.

Now I notice that I have to put the shuffle on at the bottom and then when I switch to an album, that album plays in random order too unless I remember to switch it off BEFORE I start playing an album??

Who asked for this change??

original_text:
If you like A Artist (popular) you’ll like B Artist (underrated) Recommendations? — I would like to listen to some new music!! Drop your recommendations based on popular artists that have the same/similar vibe/sound to underrated artists!!! It can be any genre! 

Here’s some recs from me!

If you like Kehlani you’ll like Samaria

If you like Thuy you’ll like Lolo Zouaï

If you like Brent Faiyaz you’ll like Josh Levi

If you like Summer Walker you’ll like Jayla Darden

If you like PARTYNEXTDOOR you’ll like Nobu Woods 

If you like Chase Atlantic or Chris Grey you’ll like Reed Wonder and Aurora Olivas (they make music together frequently and they sound amazing)

If you like Chase Atlantic you MIGHT like Odetari (his music is a hit or miss with different people) 

If you like Odetari you’ll like Kanii

If you like Childish Gambino you might like Kanii (heavy on the might part)

If you like Sabrina Claudio you’ll like Janine

If you like Sabrina Claudio you’ll like Alina Baraz 

If you like Brent Faiyaz you’ll like Arin Ray/RealestK
